compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add blocker IDs to BLOCKED output lines in sprint-list-epics.sh

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] BLOCKED output lines in sprint-list-epics.sh have a 6th tab-separated field containing comma-separated blocker IDs (open deps that block the epic)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'Test 3[123]' | grep -c PASS | grep -q 3
- [ ] Existing tests 1-30 continue to pass (no regressions)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' | grep -q '33 passed, 0 failed'
- [ ] Blocker IDs come from existing deps data already read by the script — no new data source needed
- [ ] When multiple deps are open, all appear comma-separated in the 6th field
- [ ] When some deps are closed, only open deps appear in the 6th field

## File Impact
- Source: plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh (modify Python block that prints BLOCKED lines, ~line 242)
- Test: tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh (RED tests 31-33 must turn GREEN)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: BLOCKED output now includes 6th field with comma-separated open blocker IDs
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
